Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 145

EDHD436 Cognition and Motivation in Content Area Literacy for Middle- School Students (3 Credits)

Cognitive and motivational processes of literacy and learning from

texts across subjects. Structured approaches to using reading, writing, and speaking for content learning based on approaches to knowledge, motivation, and strategies. Classroom contexts that enable middle-school students to engage with diverse texts and Internet resources are provided
